headline: How The Quanta Services (PWR) Narrative Is Evolving With Backlog, Guidance And Valuation Shifts
summary: Quanta Services’ updated fair value estimate moves from US$479.09 to US$593.30, a shift of roughly 24% that recalibrates the price target in the latest model. This change aligns with recent Street commentary that has focused on Q4 performance, multi year earnings visibility, and the company’s participation in large scale power infrastructure projects, where many firms have also raised their targets. Read on to see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Quanta Services from...
